calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-10-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V.Mack, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Petitioner, David Ho and mother of minors Amy Hoi Ha Wong, present in pro per with the minors, were sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of the MINOR'S name to : Danny Mun Jun Ho and
The Court grants the petition for change of the MINOR'S name to : Yvonne Yee Hun Ho.
Decrees signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-06-2003 Reset To Nov-10-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V.Mack, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley

Petitioner David Ho present with minors Danny Mun He and Yvonne Yee He in pro per, was sworn and examined. Petition lacks mother's signature.

The matter is continued to Nov. 10, 2003 at 9:00 am in Dept. 218. Only the mother's appearance is required at the Nov. 10th hearing.
